prompt: The Monk — vibrant editorial portrait illustration. A serene bald Buddhist monk in a glowing saffron orange robe, sitting cross-legged in a dark meditation chamber. A laptop in his lap shows glowing candlestick charts in green and red. Behind him, a large circular mandala made of Bitcoin symbols glows gold. Incense smoke rises. Mala beads on his wrist made of tiny coins. Mood: calm power, ancient meets digital. Deep purple and gold color palette, dramatic lighting, painterly style, no text.
